TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Cliff_Barker, title = Cliff_Barker, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cliff_Barker} }

S.FORM: Cliff Barker sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1912, byacing te 1 ru 15 ryax qu hintgan nya (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1998) , kinhulan nya ga Indiana, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 188 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 84 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1949 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Washington Capitols. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Cliff Barker sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1912, byacing te 1 ru 15 ryax qu hintgan nya (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1998) , kinhulan nya ga Indiana, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 188 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 84 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1949 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Washington Capitols. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨli** βarker s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ te ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * ru ** rjax qu ħintɣan nja (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) , kinħulan nja ɣa in*iana, ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, ** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. kawas~ɕ **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari ɣa, mzjup s~ɕqu te qutux laħuj ru te maɣal s~ɕquliq, ɣalun nqu was~ɕħiŋton ʦ~ʨapitols~ɕ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
